title: Corporate Sales Executive (ISO Certification)
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Established in 2002 in Singapore, Guardian Independent Certification Pte Ltd is a professional service firm offering a comprehensive range of conformity assessments and training services in Quality, Environmental, Health & Safety, and Food Safety Management Systems. Guardian Independent Certification Pte Ltd has guided many organizations toward successful accredited certification, enhancing profitability, staff motivation, and competitive advantage across all industry sectors. The company emphasizes close client relationships and proactive understanding of client needs to deliver added value and guarantee successful certification.

  • Company website: https://gicgrp.com/sg

Job Summary

Drive business growth by identifying and generating new sales leads, cultivating client relationships, and delivering quality service in a B2B sales environment within the ISO/TIC industry and related sectors.

Responsibilities

  • Identify and generate new sales channels and leads to expand business opportunities and achieve challenging sales targets
  • Follow up closely with leads to deliver quality service and convert prospects into clients
  • Seek new sales opportunities through cold calls, networking, and referrals to increase market penetration
  • Maintain and build strong relationships with potential and existing clients to foster loyalty and repeat business
  • Analyze market trends to prepare compelling business proposals and presentations that support sales objectives
  • Undertake administrative tasks to ensure smooth coordination and functionality of sales activities

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Minimum Diploma holder from any field
  • Minimum 1 year of experience in a B2B sales role preferred
  • Those with more years of relevant experience will be consider for senior role
  • Demonstrated self-motivation, ambition, adaptability, and resilience to work independently and effectively under pressure
  • Strong verbal and written communication skills to engage clients and internal teams effectively
  • Good interpersonal skills to build rapport and collaborate with diverse stakeholders
  • Sound business acumen with attention to detail and strong analytical thinking to support decision-making

postedCompany.description:
GUARDIAN INDEPENDENT CERTIFICATION PTE. LTD.

Established in 2002 in Singapore, Guardian Independent Certification Pte Ltd (GIC Pte Ltd) is a professional service firm offers comprehensive range of conformity assessments and training services in the areas of Quality, Environmental, Health & Safety and Food Safety Management Systems.

It is a wholly-owned company of GIC Group, which also owns GIC Ltd - an internationally recognized professional certification body registered in the United Kingdom and accredited by the highly regarded accreditation body - United Kingdom Accreditation Service (UKAS) and Australia and New Zealand Accreditation Body (JASANZ).

Through its qualified workforce - auditor and expert knowledge and professionalism, GIC Pte Ltd has guided many organizations towards the successful attainment of accredited certification for their management systems, and has assisted many different organizations increased profitability, motivated their staff and ultimately, gained a vital competitive edge.

GIC Pte Ltd's client base cuts across all industry sectors. Irrespective of the nature or size of your organization, establishing close and open working relationships is fundamental to GIC's service philosophy. With our proactive approach in understanding clients' needs, GIC Pte Ltd is able to deliver added value and guarantee successful certification.

In addition, GIC Pte Ltd provides a wide range of management system related training courses including IRCA (International Register of Certified Auditors) approved training – QMS Lead Auditor Course, that help you become registered to professional qualification which is recognized world-wide.


Company website: https://gicgrp.com/sg
postedCompany.name: GUARDIAN INDEPENDENT CERTIFICATION PTE. LTD.
